description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for container runtimes (Podman and Docker)

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GO-2024-3042 in github.com/containers/podman/v5@5.8.0
findings.recommendation: Upgrade github.com/containers/podman/v5 to a version that resolves GO-2024-3042. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GO-2024-3042 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
